title: Building
description: A building's floors, each with its own set of priced service bills.

steps.title: Floors
steps.description: Every floor of this building is listed here.
steps.voiceScript: This building's floors are listed here, each priced on its own.
steps.captionText: This building's floors are listed here, each priced on its own.
steps.fallbackMessage: Floors: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Open a floor
steps.description: A floor holds the bills for each service.
steps.voiceScript: Open a floor to raise and price its service bills.
steps.captionText: Open a floor to raise and price its service bills.
steps.fallbackMessage: Open a floor: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Building summary
steps.description: The floors roll up into a building total.
steps.voiceScript: The building summary rolls every floor into one total.
steps.captionText: The building summary rolls every floor into one total.
steps.fallbackMessage: Building summary: not visible on this screen yet.
